items.title: Trossard, Ramos, Dumfries: 10 transfers you may have missed during the World Cup
items.summary: Too engrossed with the World Cup drama to keep up with goings-on in the transfer market? We’ve got you covered Announced just before England’s soul-sucking semi-final defeat against Argentina , it would have been easy to miss Trossard’s £15.3m move to Istanbul. items.title: Mateus Fernandes scores ‘greatest goal ever seen’ in first start for Tottenham after £85m transfer
items.summary: MATEUS FERNANDES scored a wonder strike for Spurs on his debut as fans were left raving about "the greatest goal I've ever seen". items.title: Rangers to appeal McInnes four-match touchline ban
items.summary: Derek McInnes has been banned from the touchline for his first three domestic games as Rangers manager for his criticism of match officials.

items.title: Menzies withdraws from World Matchplay Darts after becoming unwell on stage
items.summary: Cameron Menzies' match against Ross Smith at the World Matchplay Darts was abandoned after the Scot became dizzy on stage and later fainted at the Winter Gardens on Wednesday night.

items.title: Rangers to fight McInnes ban for 'disgusting' penalty remark
items.summary: Rangers intend to contest a four-match touchline ban given to manager Derek McInnes for describing as "disgusting" the decision to award Celtic a late penalty at Motherwell in May.

items.title: Newly single Spain hero Ferran Torres and glam singer, 29, ‘spend World Cup after party flirting and teasing’
items.summary: SPAIN'S World Cup hero Ferran Torres was reportedly seen flirting with singer Ana Mena while celebrating the team's famous triumph. items.title: Aston Villa agree deal to sign Garnacho
items.summary: Aston Villa have agreed a deal to sign Alejandro Garnacho from Chelsea.

items.title: Villa agree loan deal for Chelsea winger Garnacho
items.summary: Aston Villa agree a loan deal for Chelsea winger Alejandro Garnacho until the end of the 2026-27 season, with an obligation to buy.

items.title: Liverpool primed for business: Bezos, Bhatia and the next steps at Anfield

items.title: Arsenal get William Saliba injury update as star ‘makes surgery decision’ following World Cup blow
items.summary: ARSENAL fear William Saliba will miss MONTHS of the new season after deciding not to undergo surgery to overcome his back problem. Swansea complete signing of Motherwell's Just
items.summary: Swansea City tie up a deal for Motherwell's Elijah Just after he impressed for New Zealand at the World Cup.
